# Central PE classification using embeddings generated by the Google CT foundation model

Here, my experiments on imbalanced CTPE dataset are provided. The dataset including the generated embeddings 
is in the folder:`dataset`. To train MLP, random forest, and their ensemble models
run `training.py`. 

If you would like to generate your own embedding use `CT_Foundation_Demo.ipynb`; however,
make sure you are granted access to use this model and created a dataset in Google Cloud healthcare API DICOM store for DICOM files.
